rule: Every V2 capability is assigned exactly one terminal bucket.
SHIPPED: V1 full-P2 optimizer and deployment materialization
raw byte-preservation auditor and reducer manifest v2
materialization proof, semantic smoke, screen, and confirmation workflow
VALIDATED_BUT_NOT_SHIPPED: generated-class inventory, runtime attribution, safety, and ROI analysis
generated-family lifecycle capture and matched-evidence tooling
DEFERRED_TO_V3: CGLIB, JDK proxy, Spring AOT, and Spring Data generated-class mutation
FAST_STARTUP, Kubernetes policy, additional benchmark services, and dashboard
